source: Baseball Savant Outs Above Average leaderboard via pybaseball.statcast_outs_above_average (per-player, min_att=0, all non-catcher positions 3-9, filter display_team_name != '---', sum to team-season).
metric_columns: team_frp (sum of player Fielding Runs Prevented)
team_oaa_definition: Sum of outs_above_average across all players for that team-season (Baseball Savant Statcast OAA).
team_frp_definition: Sum of fielding_runs_prevented (Statcast FRP) across all players for that team-season.
note: Multi-team-during-season players are counted under each team they appeared for (Baseball Savant splits player rows by team).
